dependencies.description: The golang compiler and build environment
dependencies.name: go

description:
s5cmd is a very fast S3 and local filesystem execution tool. It comes
with support for a multitude of operations including tab completion and
wildcard support for files, which can be very handy for your object
storage workflow while working with large numbers of files.
name: s5cmd

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system
